comment: Machine-readable dogfood pins for the Wave D conformance gate (#262). Each entry pins the upstream revision the checked-in reduction under conformance/dogfood/<name>/ was taken from. CI executes the checked-in corpus on every PR (dogfood_corpus_test.exs) and additionally clones each upstream repo at its pinned rev and runs `mix skein.test` on it (ci.yml dogfood job). When Skein changes an API, fix the upstream port, bump the pin, and refresh the checked-in copy in the same PR.
